code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {FinTech_FraudDetection} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{FinTech_PaymentGateway} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {FinTech_AuthVault} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {FinTech_FraudDetection} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(FinTech_FraudDetection) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(FinTech_LedgerService) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {FinTech_LedgerService} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(FinTech_AuthVault) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(FinTech_FraudDetection) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{FinTech_PaymentGateway} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {FinTech_LedgerService} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(FinTech_FraudDetection) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {FinTech_AuthVault} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个手动支付流程的时序图，涉及客户、Web前端、API服务器、数据库、工作人员和文件存储这几个角色。核心流程是客户先发起支付，上传凭证，然后工作人员审核，最后通知结果。
明白了。我注意到流程里有几个FinTech子系统参与，比如欺诈检测、交易队列这些，需要把它们标注出来吗？还有文件存储是独立服务还是对象存储？
对，FinTech_FraudDetection在发起支付和审核环节都要调用，FinTech_TransactionQueue负责异步通知。文件存储用独立服务F表示，专门存支付凭证。另外还需要FinTech_AuthVault做权限校验，FinTech_LedgerService处理账务。
好的，我先画出主流程：客户点击支付后，Web前端POST到API服务器，创建PENDING状态的支付记录，然后返回支付指引给客户。这里FinTech_FraudDetection会介入检测。
接下来是上传凭证环节。客户上传后，Web前端用multipart/form-data提交到API服务器，这里要走FinTech_PaymentGateway。然后文件存到File Storage，数据库状态更新为UNDER_REVIEW。
收到。文件存储完成后，API更新payment记录，带上proofUrl，然后经过FinTech_AuthVault返回给前端，提示客户"Payment under review"。
现在进入工作人员审核分支。Staff登录admin panel，查询pending payments，这里需要展示支付详情和凭证。审核结果分两种：通过或拒绝，要用alt/else画出分支。
审核通过的流程我画好了：Staff点击Approve，POST到review接口，再次经过FinTech_FraudDetection，然后更新payment为SUCCEEDED，同时用FinTech_LedgerService更新订单为PAID状态，还要创建Delivery记录生成token。
等等，SUCCEEDED状态的时间戳要记录reviewedAt，而且LedgerService更新订单时要记paidAt。另外通过后要通过SSE实时推送给客户，还要创建PAYMENT_APPROVED类型的通知。
修正了，reviewedAt和paidAt都加上了。拒绝分支我也补一下：Staff点击Reject，走FinTech_LedgerService，payment更新为FAILED，订单CANCELED，通知类型是PAYMENT_REJECTED。
最后还要画客户查询结果和取货的部分。客户可以查订单状态，如果支付通过，还能调用deliveries/reveal接口，用FinTech_LedgerService验证token，把revealsLeft减到0，然后展示交付内容。
完成。整个流程覆盖了从发起支付、上传凭证、人工审核、双分支结果通知，到最终客户取货的完整闭环。所有FinTech子系统的调用点也都标注清楚了。
